subcodes.title: Words to Helen Goodall and Ella Cooper spoken in Jan. 1908
subcodes.first_line: This is a deep and lengthy subject, but briefly, there is, as we know, a power that composes and a power that decomposes
subcodes.subjects: @demons and evil spirits, @angels, @composition and decomposition, @present and future expansion of arts and sciences; of technology, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
